name: The Lumina Band tennis bracelet
description: This is an elegant line bracelet (or tennis bracelet) composed of a continuous row of linked triangular or teardrop-shaped motifs. The entire piece is set with small, brilliant, clear stones, giving it a high-shine, contemporary sparkle. The bracelet appears to have a box-style or tongue-and-groove clasp.

name: Luxe Tennis Bracelet
description: This bracelet combines the charm of nature-inspired design with the sparkle of fine craftsmanship. At its heart lies an enchanting oval-cut pink stone, framed with pavé diamonds that enhance its brilliance. The surrounding leafy vine pattern, adorned with shimmering stones. Finished with an adjustable slider clasp. Fits all wrist sizes.

name: Twinkle Trail Adjustable Bracelet
description: Elevate your everyday elegance with this exquisitely crafted Celestia Sparkle Adjustable Bracelet, a perfect blend of modern sophistication and timeless charm. Designed for women who love subtle luxury, this bracelet features a row of dazzling round-cut crystal stones, each surrounded by a delicate halo setting that enhances brilliance and creates a radiant, diamond-like sparkle from every angle. The sleek slider mechanism not only adds a contemporary touch but also ensures a flawless, customisable fit for every wrist size.

name: Imperial Spark Adjustable Bracelet
description: Add a touch of timeless elegance to your jewelry collection with this stunning adjustable tennis bracelet. Crafted from high-quality brass and finished with premium rhodium plating, this bracelet features a dazzling oval-cut centerpiece surrounded by shimmering stones for a luxurious look. The sleek adjustable slider ensures a perfect fit, making it ideal for both everyday wear and special occasions. Available in multiple vibrant color variants, this bracelet effortlessly enhances your style with sophistication and charm

name: Regal Strings Bracelet
description: Simple yet timeless, this multi-strand pearl bracelet embodies pure sophistication. With its lustrous pearls strung in harmony, it offers a versatile elegance that transitions effortlessly from day to night.

name: Panna Mahal Bracelet
description: Grace your wrist with timeless elegance in this captivating emerald-inspired bracelet. Designed with precision and luxury, this piece radiates charm with its vibrant green emerald stones and delicate floral accents.

name: Celeste Pearl Halo Bracelet
description: Embrace timeless beauty with this exquisite three-strand pearl bracelet featuring a dazzling oval centerpiece. The centerpiece is encrusted with shimmering cubic zirconia stones and delicate floral motifs.

name: Elysian Vine Necklace & Earrings Set
description: Inspired by the untamed elegance of vines in bloom, the Elysian Vine Necklace Set features an intricate arrangement of green princess-cut and marquise stones. The rhodium-plated setting enhances its brilliance, while the earrings mirror the necklace's flowing, organic design.

name: Maharani Indira Devi Pearl Necklace & Earring Set
description: This stunning jewelry set features a classic pearl necklace beautifully adorned with delicate amethyst and diamond leaf motifs, perfectly complemented by matching earrings. Each lustrous pearl is individually knotted, leading to a captivating design where brilliant lavender diamond, meticulously cut and set, form elegant leaf shapes. Paired with matching statement earrings

name: Pankhuri Pearl Choker & Earring Set
description: This exquisite jewellery set presents a captivating blend of classic elegance and antique charm, featuring a stunning multi-strand pearl choker necklace perfectly paired with matching stud earrings.At its heart lies a striking silver-toned medallion, intricately designed with a central diamond.

name: Ornara Pearl Necklace & Earring Set
description: Drape yourself in timeless elegance with this exquisite 18kt gold-plated necklace and earring set, a true masterpiece of regal craftsmanship. The necklace features a multi-layered chain design that gracefully flows into a grand pendant, meticulously adorned with lustrous pearls and shimmering zircon diamond .The matching earrings echo the grandeur of royal jhumkas, designed with intricate latticework and finished with pearl hangings that sway with grace.

name: Cindrella Pearl Necklace & Earring Set
description: Step into timeless elegance with this luxurious statement jewelry set, designed to captivate at every occasion. The set features a multi-layered choker necklace adorned with rows of sparkling CZ diamonds, creating a bold yet graceful neckline. Matching elongated earrings mirror the refined symmetry, enhancing the face with a sleek silhouette.

name: Maharani Gayatri Devi Pearl Necklace & Earring Set
description: The necklace is a delicate contemporary elegance, featuring a series of three-layer round, lustrous pearls that are evenly spaced and alternated with sparkling star-shaped zircon clusters. The matching earrings mirror the design, combining pearls and zircon stars in a linear pattern for a cohesive and stylish finish.

name: Gulzar Whirl Necklace & Earrings Set
description: A radiant celebration of rhythm and color, Gulzar Whirl is a statement necklace set that twirls like a festive lehenga in motion. Intricately paved with emerald green and ruby pink teardrop stones, this design mimics the sweeping motion of a bloom in full flourish.

name: Chaand Jhumka Earrings
description: A majestic chandelier earring that combines pearls and cubic zirconia diamonds in an intricate design. Crafted for weddings and grand celebrations, this piece brings a perfect blend of regal charm and modern sparkle.

name: Chandelier Earrings
description: Dripping in elegance, these earrings are crafted with a striking pear-shaped pearl stud framed by shimmering cubic zirconia diamonds. Dangling below, three elongated teardrop pearls create a graceful, fluid silhouette, enhanced with glittering crystal accents set in a luxe gold-tone base.

name: Zenith Earrings
description: Add a royal touch to your look with these exquisite green emerald stone and pearl drop earrings. Designed with a vibrant green stud top and a conical motif encrusted with shimmering diamonds and delicate pearls, these earrings capture the perfect blend of tradition and modern elegance.

name: Rasika Jhumar Earrings
description: Embrace timeless tradition with the Jhumar Earrings, a statement piece crafted  for modern woman. These earrings feature a hand-painted green meenakari floral motif at the top, bordered with delicate ivory pearls. Long cascading chains are adorned with multiple golden ghungroo clusters, leading to an intricately designed dome-shaped jhumka finished with dainty pearl hangings.

name: Celestine Bloom Statement Earrings
description: Elevate your elegance with the breathtaking beauty of our Celestine Bloom Statement Earrings. Crafted from high-quality brass base material, these luxurious dangle earrings feature a delicate floral stud top that flows into an intricate teardrop silhouette adorned with shimmering crystals.

name: Seraphina Luxe Teardrop Earrings
description: Made with a durable brass base material, these earrings are lightweight, sturdy, and comfortable for long hours of wear. The premium AAA cubic zirconia stones add exceptional sparkle, while the available colour variations let you choose the perfect shade to match your outfit and occasion.

name: Elara Crystal Bloom Drop Earrings
description: Shine with effortless elegance in our Elara Crystal Bloom Drop Earrings, a timeless statement piece designed to capture attention. Featuring a brilliant round-cut centerpiece framed by delicate crystal detailing and intricate openwork accents, these earrings offer a perfect blend of modern sparkle and classic sophistication.
